title: Evaluation of groundnut genotypes for field resistance to seed infection by Aspergillus flavus and to aflatoxin contamination: Report of Work Done During May 1988 - April 1989
abstract:
Twenty-one groundnut genotypes reported resistant and
susceptible to in vitro seed colonization by Aspergillus flavus were tested for field resistance to seed infection, particularly preharvest infection by the aflatoxigenic fungus, and for aflatoxin contamination.....
